queries.q1: how do I reset my password
queries.q2: what payment methods do you accept

corpus.d1: To reset your password, click the forgot password link on the login page and follow the email instructions.
corpus.d2: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal for all purchases.
corpus.d3: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the billing section of your account settings.
corpus.d4: Our office hours are Monday to Friday, nine to five.
corpus.d5: Forgot your password? Use the password recovery option to receive a reset link by email.
corpus.d6: Subscriptions renew automatically; to stop renewal, cancel before the billing date in account settings.
corpus.d7: Shipping is free on orders over fifty dollars within the continental United States.
